curation_notes: The patch modifies only src/Image/Cache.php (1 file, +33 lines). The fix adds SVG image reference validation inside the resolve_url static method: after determining a file is an SVG, the code now parses the SVG XML and checks each <image> element's href/xlink:href attribute against the same protocol restrictions and URL validation used for top-level images. It also blocks SVG self-references. Pre-assigned vuln_class 'xxe' (CWE-611) is correct — the vulnerability allows SVG documents to reference external/restricted entities via embedded image tags, bypassing isRemoteEnabled restrictions. No sibling files exist in src/Image/ (Cache.php is the only file).
